nasb.text: Martha then said to Jesus, “Lord, if You had been here, my brother would not have died.

esv.text: Martha said to Jesus, “Lord, if you had been here, my brother would not have died.

cnv.text: 馬大對耶穌說：“主啊，如果你早在這裡，我的兄弟就不會死了！

ccb.text: 玛大对耶稣说：“主啊，你如果早在这里，我弟弟就不会死了。

csbs.text: 玛妲对耶稣说：“主啊，如果你早在这里，我弟弟就不会死了。
